changes.title: Dreaming/内存-core: 更改 the default `dreaming.storage.mode` 从 `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land 在 `内存/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` 而不是 being injected 进入 `内存/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily 内存 files no longer get dominated 通过 structured candidate output, 和 the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete 使用 hundreds 的 phase-block lines 在 every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt 在 通过 设置 `插件.entries.内存-core.配置.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: change the default `dreaming.storage.mode` from `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land in `memory/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` instead of being injected into `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily memory files no longer get dominated by structured candidate output, and the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete with hundreds of phase-block lines on every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt in by setting `plugins.entries.memory-core.config.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.

changes.title: WhatsApp/web-session: drain the pending per-认证 creds save queue 之前 reopening sockets so reconnect-time 认证 bootstrap no longer races 在-flight `creds.json` writes 和 falsely restores 从 backup. (#67464) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/web-session: drain the pending per-auth creds save queue before reopening sockets so reconnect-time auth bootstrap no longer races in-flight `creds.json` writes and falsely restores from backup. (#67464) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/catchup: 添加 a per-message 重试 ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message 使用 a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. 之后 N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message 在 subsequent sweeps, 和 lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still 重试 从 the same point as 之前. Also 修复 a lost-更新 race 在 the persistent dedupe file lock that 静默地 dropped inbound GUIDs 在 concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap 在 version upgrade, 和 a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: add a per-message retry ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message with a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. After N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message on subsequent sweeps, and lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still retry from the same point as before. Also fixes a lost-update race in the persistent dedupe file lock that silently dropped inbound GUIDs on concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap on version upgrade, and a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: normalize stale native transport metadata 在 both runtime resolution 和 discovery/listing so legacy `OpenAI-Codex` rows 使用 missing `API` 或 `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport 而不是 routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original 修复 proposed 在 #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) 和 #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: normalize stale native transport metadata in both runtime resolution and discovery/listing so legacy `openai-codex` rows with missing `api` or `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport instead of routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original fixes proposed in #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) and #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)

changes.title: Agent/failover: treat HTML provider 错误 pages as upstream transport failures 为了 CDN-style 5xx responses 不适用 misclassifying embedded body text as API rate limits, while still preserving 认证 remediation 为了 HTML 401/403 pages 和 代理 remediation 为了 HTML 407 pages. (#67642) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: treat HTML provider error pages as upstream transport failures for CDN-style 5xx responses without misclassifying embedded body text as API rate limits, while still preserving auth remediation for HTML 401/403 pages and proxy remediation for HTML 407 pages. (#67642) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: 网关/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a 配置 write touches `skills.*` (为了 example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, 或 `skills.profile`). Existing Agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` 在 `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; 不适用 this invalidation, removing a bundled skill 从 the allowlist left the old snapshot live 和 the 模型 kept calling the disabled 工具, producing `工具 <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run 超时. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a config write touches `skills.*` (for example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, or `skills.profile`). Existing agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` in `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; without this invalidation, removing a bundled skill from the allowlist left the old snapshot live and the model kept calling the disabled tool, producing `Tool <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run timeout. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Agent/工具-loop: 启用 the unknown-工具 stream guard 通过 default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off 在 the default configuration. A hallucinated 或 removed 工具 (为了 example `himalaya` 之后 it was dropped 从 `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "工具 X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run 超时. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers 在 tools that are objectively not registered 在 the run, so it 现在 stays 在 regardless 的 `tools.loopDetection.enabled` 和 still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool-loop: enable the unknown-tool stream guard by default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off in the default configuration. A hallucinated or removed tool (for example `himalaya` after it was dropped from `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "Tool X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run timeout. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers on tools that are objectively not registered in the run, so it now stays on regardless of `tools.loopDetection.enabled` and still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: TUI/streaming: 添加 a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` 之后 30s 的 delta silence 在 the active run. Guards against lost 或 late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, 网关 restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck 在 `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context 选项 (set to `0` to 禁用), 和 the handler 现在 exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer 在 shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/streaming: add a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` after 30s of delta silence on the active run. Guards against lost or late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, gateway restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck on `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context option (set to `0` to disable), and the handler now exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer on shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Extensions/lmstudio: 添加 exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio 模型-load failure (为了 example the built-在 内存 guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s 为了 every chat request. The wrapper 现在 records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple 使用 a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown 和 skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the 模型 is often already loaded via the LM Studio 界面). The combined `preload failed` log line 现在 reports consecutive-failure count 和 remaining cooldown so operators can act 在 the real issue 而不是 drowning 在 repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Extensions/lmstudio: add exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio model-load failure (for example the built-in memory guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s for every chat request. The wrapper now records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple with a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown and skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the model is often already loaded via the LM Studio UI). The combined `preload failed` log line now reports consecutive-failure count and remaining cooldown so operators can act on the real issue instead of drowning in repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Agent/replay: re-run 工具/result pairing 之后 strict replay 工具-call ID sanitization 在 outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan 工具-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` 期间 compaction 和 重试 flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: 网关/startup: 修复 spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop 在 Linux/systemd 当 插件 auto-启用 is the only startup 配置 write; the 配置 hash guard was not captured 为了 that write 路径, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external 更改 和 trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db 之后 repeated cycles. 修复 #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: fix spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop on Linux/systemd when plugin auto-enable is the only startup config write; the config hash guard was not captured for that write path, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external change and trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db after repeated cycles. Fixes #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf

changes.title: Agent/workspace files: route `Agent.files.get`, `Agent.files.set`, 和 workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases 为了 allowlisted Agent files, 和 have `fs-safe` 解决 opened-file real paths 从 the file descriptor 之前 falling back to 路径-based `realpath` so a symlink swap 之间 `open` 和 `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated 路径 off the intended inode. changes.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: normalize stale native transport metadata in both runtime resolution and discovery/listing so legacy `openai-codex` rows with missing `api` or `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport instead of routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original fixes proposed in #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) and #67159 (hclsys). items.title: Extensions/lmstudio: 添加 exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio 模型-load failure (为了 example the built-在 内存 guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s 为了 every chat request. The wrapper 现在 records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple 使用 a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown 和 skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the 模型 is often already loaded via the LM Studio 界面). The combined `preload failed` log line 现在 reports consecutive-failure count 和 remaining cooldown so operators can act 在 the real issue 而不是 drowning 在 repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Extensions/lmstudio: add exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio model-load failure (for example the built-in memory guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s for every chat request. The wrapper now records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple with a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown and skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the model is often already loaded via the LM Studio UI). The combined `preload failed` log line now reports consecutive-failure count and remaining cooldown so operators can act on the real issue instead of drowning in repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: Agent/replay: re-run 工具/result pairing 之后 strict replay 工具-call ID sanitization 在 outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan 工具-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` 期间 compaction 和 重试 flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.
items.rawTitle: Agents/replay: re-run tool/result pairing after strict replay tool-call ID sanitization on outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan tool-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` during compaction and retry flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.

items.title: Dreaming/内存-core: 更改 the default `dreaming.storage.mode` 从 `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land 在 `内存/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` 而不是 being injected 进入 `内存/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily 内存 files no longer get dominated 通过 structured candidate output, 和 the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete 使用 hundreds 的 phase-block lines 在 every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt 在 通过 设置 `插件.entries.内存-core.配置.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.
items.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: change the default `dreaming.storage.mode` from `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land in `memory/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` instead of being injected into `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily memory files no longer get dominated by structured candidate output, and the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete with hundreds of phase-block lines on every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt in by setting `plugins.entries.memory-core.config.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.

items.title: 网关/startup: 修复 spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop 在 Linux/systemd 当 插件 auto-启用 is the only startup 配置 write; the 配置 hash guard was not captured 为了 that write 路径, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external 更改 和 trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db 之后 repeated cycles. 修复 #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf
items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: fix spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop on Linux/systemd when plugin auto-enable is the only startup config write; the config hash guard was not captured for that write path, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external change and trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db after repeated cycles. Fixes #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf

items.rawTitle: Setup/providers: guard preferred-provider lookup during setup so malformed plugin metadata with a missing provider id no longer crashes the wizard with `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'trim')`. (#66649) Thanks @Tianworld.

items.title: 网关/认证: 解决 the active 网关 bearer per-request 在 the HTTP server 和 the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket 路径, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` 或 配置 hot-reload stops authenticating 在 `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, 插件 HTTP routes, 和 the canvas upgrade 路径 immediately 而不是 remaining valid 在 HTTP until 网关 restart. (#66651) Thanks @mmaps.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: resolve the active gateway bearer per-request on the HTTP server and the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket path, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` or config hot-reload stops authenticating on `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, plugin HTTP routes, and the canvas upgrade path immediately instead of remaining valid on HTTP until gateway restart. (#66651) Thanks @mmaps.

items.title: Secrets/插件/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across 插件 preload, read-only status/Agent surfaces, 和 runtime 认证 paths so unresolved refs no longer 崩溃 read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: Secrets/plugins/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across plugin preload, read-only status/agents surfaces, and runtime auth paths so unresolved refs no longer crash read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.

items.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` plugin installs from falling back to hook-pack installs after security scan failures, while still preserving non-security fallback behavior for real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.

items.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: skip dreaming narrative transcripts from session-store metadata before bootstrap records land so dream diary prompt/prose lines do not pollute session ingestion. (#67315) thanks @jalehman.

items.title: Cron/announce delivery: keep isolated announce `NO_REPLY` stripping case-insensitive across direct 和 text delivery, 保留 structured media-only sends 当 a caption strips silent, 和 derive main-session awareness 从 the cleaned payloads so silent captions no longer leak stale `NO_REPLY` text. (#65016) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.
items.rawTitle: Cron/announce delivery: keep isolated announce `NO_REPLY` stripping case-insensitive across direct and text delivery, preserve structured media-only sends when a caption strips silent, and derive main-session awareness from the cleaned payloads so silent captions no longer leak stale `NO_REPLY` text. (#65016) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.

items.title: 内存-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads 的 arbitrary workspace markdown paths 和 only 允许 canonical 内存 files (`内存.md`, `内存.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `内存/**`) plus exact paths 的 active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD 内存 backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` 工具-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Memory-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads of arbitrary workspace markdown paths and only allow canonical memory files (`MEMORY.md`, `memory.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `memory/**`) plus exact paths of active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD memory backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` tool-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: GitHub Copilot/内存 search: 添加 a GitHub Copilot embedding provider 为了 内存 search, 和 expose a dedicated Copilot embedding host helper so 插件 can 复用 the transport while honoring remote overrides, 令牌 refresh, 和 safer payload validation. (#61718) Thanks @feiskyer 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/memory search: add a GitHub Copilot embedding provider for memory search, and expose a dedicated Copilot embedding host helper so plugins can reuse the transport while honoring remote overrides, token refresh, and safer payload validation. items.title: Packaging/插件: prune common test/spec cargo 从 bundled 插件 runtime dependencies 和 fail npm release validation if packaged test cargo reappears, keeping published tarballs leaner 不适用 插件-specific special cases. (#67275) thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Packaging/plugins: prune common test/spec cargo from bundled plugin runtime dependencies and fail npm release validation if packaged test cargo reappears, keeping published tarballs leaner without plugin-specific special cases. (#67275) thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: Agent/context + 内存: trim default startup/skills prompt budgets, cap `memory_get` excerpts 通过 default 使用 explicit continuation metadata, 和 keep QMD reads aligned 使用 the same bounded excerpt contract so long sessions pull less context 通过 default 不适用 losing deterministic follow-up reads.
items.rawTitle: Agents/context + Memory: trim default startup/skills prompt budgets, cap `memory_get` excerpts by default with explicit continuation metadata, and keep QMD reads aligned with the same bounded excerpt contract so long sessions pull less context by default without losing deterministic follow-up reads.

items.title: Speech/TTS: auto-启用 the bundled Microsoft 和 ElevenLabs speech providers, 和 route generic TTS directive tokens through the explicit 或 active provider first so overrides like `[[tts:speed=1.2]]` 停止 静默地 landing 在 the wrong provider. (#62846) Thanks @stainlu.
items.rawTitle: Speech/TTS: auto-enable the bundled Microsoft and ElevenLabs speech providers, and route generic TTS directive tokens through the explicit or active provider first so overrides like `[[tts:speed=1.2]]` stop silently landing on the wrong provider. (#62846) Thanks @stainlu.

items.title: 网关/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a 配置 write touches `skills.*` (为了 example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, 或 `skills.profile`). Existing Agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` 在 `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; 不适用 this invalidation, removing a bundled skill 从 the allowlist left the old snapshot live 和 the 模型 kept calling the disabled 工具, producing `工具 <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run 超时. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a config write touches `skills.*` (for example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, or `skills.profile`). Existing agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` in `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; without this invalidation, removing a bundled skill from the allowlist left the old snapshot live and the model kept calling the disabled tool, producing `Tool <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run timeout. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: Agent/工具-loop: 启用 the unknown-工具 stream guard 通过 default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off 在 the default configuration. A hallucinated 或 removed 工具 (为了 example `himalaya` 之后 it was dropped 从 `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "工具 X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run 超时. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers 在 tools that are objectively not registered 在 the run, so it 现在 stays 在 regardless 的 `tools.loopDetection.enabled` 和 still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Agents/tool-loop: enable the unknown-tool stream guard by default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off in the default configuration. A hallucinated or removed tool (for example `himalaya` after it was dropped from `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "Tool X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run timeout. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers on tools that are objectively not registered in the run, so it now stays on regardless of `tools.loopDetection.enabled` and still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. items.title: BlueBubbles/catchup: 添加 a per-message 重试 ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message 使用 a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. 之后 N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message 在 subsequent sweeps, 和 lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still 重试 从 the same point as 之前. Also 修复 a lost-更新 race 在 the persistent dedupe file lock that 静默地 dropped inbound GUIDs 在 concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap 在 version upgrade, 和 a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: add a per-message retry ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message with a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. After N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message on subsequent sweeps, and lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still retry from the same point as before. Also fixes a lost-update race in the persistent dedupe file lock that silently dropped inbound GUIDs on concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap on version upgrade, and a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: TUI/streaming: 添加 a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` 之后 30s 的 delta silence 在 the active run. Guards against lost 或 late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, 网关 restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck 在 `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context 选项 (set to `0` to 禁用), 和 the handler 现在 exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer 在 shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: TUI/streaming: add a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` after 30s of delta silence on the active run. Guards against lost or late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, gateway restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck on `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context option (set to `0` to disable), and the handler now exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer on shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/inbound: add a persistent file-backed GUID dedupe so MessagePoller webhook replays after BB Server restart or reconnect no longer cause the agent to re-reply to already-handled messages. (#19176, #12053, #66816) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context 和 ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` 和 `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary 进入 prompt context through reply metadata 或 archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context and ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` and `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary into prompt context through reply metadata or archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.

items.title: Telegram/native commands: restore 插件-registry-backed auto defaults 为了 native commands 和 native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering 当 `commands.native` 和 `commands.nativeSkills` stay 在 `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: restore plugin-registry-backed auto defaults for native commands and native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering when `commands.native` and `commands.nativeSkills` stay on `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.

items.title: BlueBubbles/catchup: replay missed Webhook messages 之后 网关 restart via a persistent per-account cursor 和 `/API/v1/message/query?之后=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the 网关 was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` 路径 和 is deduped 通过 #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: replay missed webhook messages after gateway restart via a persistent per-account cursor and `/api/v1/message/query?after=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the gateway was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` path and is deduped by #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram 命令-sync cache process-local so 网关 restarts re-register the menu 而不是 trusting stale 在-disk sync state 之后 Telegram cleared commands out-的-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram command-sync cache process-local so gateway restarts re-register the menu instead of trusting stale on-disk sync state after Telegram cleared commands out-of-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.

items.title: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends 避免 buffer spikes 和 reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends avoid buffer spikes and reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine 当 a third-party context engine 插件 fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, 或 contract violation), preventing a full 网关 outage 在 every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine when a third-party context engine plugin fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, or contract violation), preventing a full gateway outage on every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Control 界面/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible 期间 active sends 通过 deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted 和 errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible during active sends by deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted and errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Media/Slack: 允许 host-local CSV 和 Markdown uploads only 当 the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work 不适用 letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` 或 `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.
items.rawTitle: Media/Slack: allow host-local CSV and Markdown uploads only when the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work without letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` or `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.

items.title: Video generation/live tests: bound provider polling 为了 live video smoke, default to the fast non-FAL text-to-video 路径, 和 use a one-second lobster prompt so release validation no longer waits indefinitely 在 slow provider queues.

Backed 通过 a new `模型.authStatus` 网关 method that strips credentials 和 caches 为了 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.

Backed by a new `models.authStatus` gateway method that strips credentials and caches for 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: 添加 cloud storage 支持 to `内存-lancedb` so durable 内存 indexes can run 在 remote object storage 而不是 local disk only. (#63502) Thanks @rugvedS07.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/内存 search: 添加 a GitHub Copilot embedding provider 为了 内存 search, 和 expose a dedicated Copilot embedding host helper so 插件 can 复用 the transport while honoring remote overrides, 令牌 refresh, 和 safer payload validation. (#61718) Thanks @feiskyer 和 @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/local 模型: 添加 experimental `Agent.defaults.experimental.localModelLean: true` to drop heavyweight default tools like `浏览器`, `cron`, 和 `message`, reducing prompt size 为了 weaker local-模型 setups 不适用 changing the normal 路径. (#66495) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: Packaging/插件: localize bundled 插件 runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, 和 tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner 和 core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. (#67099) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Packaging/plugins: localize bundled plugin runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, and tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner and core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. changes.title: 内存-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads 的 arbitrary workspace markdown paths 和 only 允许 canonical 内存 files (`内存.md`, `内存.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `内存/**`) plus exact paths 的 active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD 内存 backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` 工具-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads of arbitrary workspace markdown paths and only allow canonical memory files (`MEMORY.md`, `memory.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `memory/**`) plus exact paths of active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD memory backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` tool-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Cron/Agent: forward embedded-run 工具 policy 和 internal event params 进入 the attempt layer so `--tools` allowlists, cron-owned message-工具 suppression, explicit message targeting, 和 命令-路径 internal events all take effect at runtime 重新. (#62675) Thanks @hexsprite.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/agents: forward embedded-run tool policy and internal event params into the attempt layer so `--tools` allowlists, cron-owned message-tool suppression, explicit message targeting, and command-path internal events all take effect at runtime again. (#62675) Thanks @hexsprite.

changes.rawTitle: Setup/providers: guard preferred-provider lookup during setup so malformed plugin metadata with a missing provider id no longer crashes the wizard with `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'trim')`. (#66649) Thanks @Tianworld.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix/security: normalize sandboxed profile avatar params, preserve `mxc://` avatar URLs, and surface gmail watcher stop failures during reload. (#64701) Thanks @slepybear.

changes.title: Telegram/documents: drop leaked binary caption bytes 从 inbound Telegram text handling so document uploads like `.mobi` 或 `.epub` no longer explode prompt 令牌 counts. (#66663) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/documents: drop leaked binary caption bytes from inbound Telegram text handling so document uploads like `.mobi` or `.epub` no longer explode prompt token counts. (#66663) Thanks @joelnishanth.

changes.title: 网关/认证: 解决 the active 网关 bearer per-request 在 the HTTP server 和 the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket 路径, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` 或 配置 hot-reload stops authenticating 在 `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, 插件 HTTP routes, 和 the canvas upgrade 路径 immediately 而不是 remaining valid 在 HTTP until 网关 restart. (#66651) Thanks @mmaps.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: resolve the active gateway bearer per-request on the HTTP server and the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket path, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` or config hot-reload stops authenticating on `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, plugin HTTP routes, and the canvas upgrade path immediately instead of remaining valid on HTTP until gateway restart. (#66651) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: cap the compaction reserve-令牌 floor to the 模型 context window so small-context local 模型 (e.g. Ollama 使用 16K tokens) no longer trigger context-overflow errors 或 infinite compaction loops 在 every prompt. (#65671) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: cap the compaction reserve-token floor to the model context window so small-context local models (e.g. Ollama with 16K tokens) no longer trigger context-overflow errors or infinite compaction loops on every prompt. (#65671) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI Responses: classify the exact `Unknown 错误 (no 错误 details 在 response)` transport failure as failover reason `unknown` so assistant/模型 fallback still runs 为了 that no-details failure 路径. (#65254) Thanks @OpenCodeEngineer.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI Responses: classify the exact `Unknown error (no error details in response)` transport failure as failover reason `unknown` so assistant/model fallback still runs for that no-details failure path. (#65254) Thanks @OpenCodeEngineer.

changes.title: 模型/probe: surface invalid-模型 probe failures as `format` 而不是 `unknown` 在 `模型 list --probe`, 和 lock the invalid-模型 fallback 路径 在 使用 regression coverage. (#50028) Thanks @xiwuqi.
changes.rawTitle: Models/probe: surface invalid-model probe failures as `format` instead of `unknown` in `models list --probe`, and lock the invalid-model fallback path in with regression coverage. (#50028) Thanks @xiwuqi.

changes.title: Agent/failover: classify OpenAI-compatible `finish_reason: network_error` stream failures as 超时 so 模型 fallback retries continue 而不是 stopping 使用 an unknown failover reason. (#61784) thanks @lawrence3699.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify OpenAI-compatible `finish_reason: network_error` stream failures as timeout so model fallback retries continue instead of stopping with an unknown failover reason. (#61784) thanks @lawrence3699.

changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/channels: normalize channel setup metadata before discovery and validation so malformed or mixed-shape channel plugin metadata no longer breaks setup and onboarding channel lists. (#66706) Thanks @darkamenosa.

changes.title: Slack/native commands: 修复 选项 menus 为了 slash commands such as `/verbose` 当 Slack renders native buttons 通过 giving each button a unique action ID while still routing them through the shared `openclaw_cmdarg*` listener. Thanks @Wangmerlyn.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/native commands: fix option menus for slash commands such as `/verbose` when Slack renders native buttons by giving each button a unique action ID while still routing them through the shared `openclaw_cmdarg*` listener. Thanks @Wangmerlyn.

changes.title: 飞书/Webhook: harden the Webhook transport 和 card-action replay guards to fail closed 在 missing `encryptKey` 和 blank callback tokens — refuse to start the Webhook transport 不适用 an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests 当 no 密钥 is present 而不是 accepting them, 和 drop blank card-action tokens 之前 the dedupe claim 和 dispatcher. Defense-在-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/webhook: harden the webhook transport and card-action replay guards to fail closed on missing `encryptKey` and blank callback tokens — refuse to start the webhook transport without an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests when no key is present instead of accepting them, and drop blank card-action tokens before the dedupe claim and dispatcher. Defense-in-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/workspace files: route `Agent.files.get`, `Agent.files.set`, 和 workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases 为了 allowlisted Agent files, 和 have `fs-safe` 解决 opened-file real paths 从 the file descriptor 之前 falling back to 路径-based `realpath` so a symlink swap 之间 `open` 和 `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated 路径 off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/workspace files: route `agents.files.get`, `agents.files.set`, and workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases for allowlisted agent files, and have `fs-safe` resolve opened-file real paths from the file descriptor before falling back to path-based `realpath` so a symlink swap between `open` and `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated path off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

(#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.rawTitle: Slack/native commands: fix option menus for slash commands such as `/verbose` when Slack renders native buttons by giving each button a unique action ID while still routing them through the shared `openclaw_cmdarg*` listener. Thanks @Wangmerlyn.

items.title: 飞书/Webhook: harden the Webhook transport 和 card-action replay guards to fail closed 在 missing `encryptKey` 和 blank callback tokens — refuse to start the Webhook transport 不适用 an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests 当 no 密钥 is present 而不是 accepting them, 和 drop blank card-action tokens 之前 the dedupe claim 和 dispatcher. Defense-在-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Feishu/webhook: harden the webhook transport and card-action replay guards to fail closed on missing `encryptKey` and blank callback tokens — refuse to start the webhook transport without an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests when no key is present instead of accepting them, and drop blank card-action tokens before the dedupe claim and dispatcher. Defense-in-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Agent/fallback: 保留 the original prompt body 在 模型 fallback retries 使用 session history so the retrying 模型 keeps the active task 而不是 only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.
items.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: preserve the original prompt body on model fallback retries with session history so the retrying model keeps the active task instead of only seeing a generic continue message. (#66029) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.

items.title: Reply/secrets: 解决 active reply channel/account SecretRefs 之前 reply-run message-action discovery so channel 令牌 SecretRefs (为了 example Discord) do not degrade 进入 discovery-time unresolved-secret failures. (#66796) Thanks @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: Reply/secrets: resolve active reply channel/account SecretRefs before reply-run message-action discovery so channel token SecretRefs (for example Discord) do not degrade into discovery-time unresolved-secret failures. (#66796) Thanks @joshavant.

items.title: Agent/Anthropic: ignore non-positive Anthropic Messages 令牌 overrides 和 fail locally 当 no positive 令牌 budget remains, so invalid `max_tokens` values no longer reach the provider API. (#66664) thanks @jalehman
items.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: ignore non-positive Anthropic Messages token overrides and fail locally when no positive token budget remains, so invalid `max_tokens` values no longer reach the provider API. (#66664) thanks @jalehman

items.title: BlueBubbles/inbound: 添加 a persistent file-backed GUID dedupe so MessagePoller Webhook replays 之后 BB Server restart 或 reconnect no longer cause the Agent to re-reply to already-handled messages. (#19176, #12053, #66816) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/inbound: add a persistent file-backed GUID dedupe so MessagePoller webhook replays after BB Server restart or reconnect no longer cause the agent to re-reply to already-handled messages. (#19176, #12053, #66816) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context 和 ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` 和 `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary 进入 prompt context through reply metadata 或 archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary reply context and ZIP-like archive extraction so `.epub` and `.mobi` uploads can no longer leak raw binary into prompt context through reply metadata or archive-to-`text/plain` coercion. (#66877) Thanks @martinfrancois.

items.title: Telegram/native commands: restore 插件-registry-backed auto defaults 为了 native commands 和 native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering 当 `commands.native` 和 `commands.nativeSkills` stay 在 `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: restore plugin-registry-backed auto defaults for native commands and native skills so Telegram slash commands keep registering when `commands.native` and `commands.nativeSkills` stay on `auto`. (#66843) Thanks @kashevk0.

items.title: 修复(bluebubbles): replay missed Webhook messages 之后 网关 restart via a persistent per-account cursor 和 `/API/v1/message/query?之后=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the 网关 was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` 路径 和 is deduped 通过 #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: fix(bluebubbles): replay missed webhook messages after gateway restart via a persistent per-account cursor and `/api/v1/message/query?after=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the gateway was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` path and is deduped by #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram 命令-sync cache process-local so 网关 restarts re-register the menu 而不是 trusting stale 在-disk sync state 之后 Telegram cleared commands out-的-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram command-sync cache process-local so gateway restarts re-register the menu instead of trusting stale on-disk sync state after Telegram cleared commands out-of-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.

items.title: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends 避免 buffer spikes 和 reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends avoid buffer spikes and reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine 当 a third-party context engine 插件 fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, 或 contract violation), preventing a full 网关 outage 在 every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine when a third-party context engine plugin fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, or contract violation), preventing a full gateway outage on every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Control 界面/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible 期间 active sends 通过 deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted 和 errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible during active sends by deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted and errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Media/Slack: 允许 host-local CSV 和 Markdown uploads only 当 the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work 不适用 letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` 或 `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.
items.rawTitle: Media/Slack: allow host-local CSV and Markdown uploads only when the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work without letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` or `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.

items.title: Matrix/E2EE: keep startup bootstrap conservative 为了 passwordless 令牌-认证 bots, still attempt the guarded repair pass 不适用 requiring `channels.matrix.password`, 和 document the remaining password-UIA limitation. (#66228) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.
items.rawTitle: Matrix/E2EE: keep startup bootstrap conservative for passwordless token-auth bots, still attempt the guarded repair pass without requiring `channels.matrix.password`, and document the remaining password-UIA limitation. (#66228) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.

items.title: Cron/announce delivery: suppress mixed-content isolated cron announce replies that end 使用 `NO_REPLY` so trailing silent sentinels no longer leak summary text to the target channel. (#65004) Thanks @neo1027144-creator.
items.rawTitle: Cron/announce delivery: suppress mixed-content isolated cron announce replies that end with `NO_REPLY` so trailing silent sentinels no longer leak summary text to the target channel. (#65004) Thanks @neo1027144-creator.

items.title: 插件/bundled channels: partition bundled channel lazy caches 通过 active bundled root so `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR` flips 停止 reusing stale 插件, setup, secrets, 和 runtime state. (#67200) Thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/bundled channels: partition bundled channel lazy caches by active bundled root so `OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR` flips stop reusing stale plugin, setup, secrets, and runtime state. (#67200) Thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: Video generation/live tests: bound provider polling 为了 live video smoke, default to the fast non-FAL text-to-video 路径, 和 use a one-second lobster prompt so release validation no longer waits indefinitely 在 slow provider queues.
items.rawTitle: Video generation/live tests: bound provider polling for live video smoke, default to the fast non-FAL text-to-video path, and use a one-second lobster prompt so release validation no longer waits indefinitely on slow provider queues.

items.title: Agent/workspace files: route `Agent.files.get`, `Agent.files.set`, 和 workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases 为了 allowlisted Agent files, 和 have `fs-safe` 解决 opened-file real paths 从 the file descriptor 之前 falling back to 路径-based `realpath` so a symlink swap 之间 `open` 和 `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated 路径 off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Agents/workspace files: route `agents.files.get`, `agents.files.set`, and workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases for allowlisted agent files, and have `fs-safe` resolve opened-file real paths from the file descriptor before falling back to path-based `realpath` so a symlink swap between `open` and `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated path off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: QQBot/cron: guard against undefined `event.content` 在 `parseFaceTags` 和 `filterInternalMarkers` so cron-triggered Agent turns 使用 no content payload no longer 崩溃 使用 `TypeError: Cannot read properties 的 undefined (reading 'startsWith')`. (#66302) Thanks @xinmotlanthua.
items.rawTitle: QQBot/cron: guard against undefined `event.content` in `parseFaceTags` and `filterInternalMarkers` so cron-triggered agent turns with no content payload no longer crash with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'startsWith')`. (#66302) Thanks @xinmotlanthua.

items.title: 内存/dreaming: 停止 ordinary transcripts that merely quote the dream-diary prompt 从 being classified as internal dreaming runs 和 静默地 dropped 从 session recall ingestion. (#66852) Thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: stop ordinary transcripts that merely quote the dream-diary prompt from being classified as internal dreaming runs and silently dropped from session recall ingestion. (#66852) Thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: 网关/安全: enforce `localRoots` containment 在 the webchat audio embedding 路径. (#67298) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/security: enforce `localRoots` containment on the webchat audio embedding path. (#67298) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: Dreaming/内存-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, 为了 daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps 的 the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days 而不是 stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.
items.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, for daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps of the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days instead of stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.

items.title: Ollama/onboarding: split setup 进入 `Cloud + Local`, `Cloud only`, 和 `Local only`, 支持 direct `OLLAMA_API_KEY` cloud setup 不适用 a local daemon, 和 keep Ollama web search 在 the local-host 路径. (#67005) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: 添加 forward-compat 支持 为了 `gpt-5.4-pro`, including Codex pricing/limits 和 list/status visibility 之前 the upstream catalog catches up. (#66453) Thanks @jepson-liu.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: add forward-compat support for `gpt-5.4-pro`, including Codex pricing/limits and list/status visibility before the upstream catalog catches up. (#66453) Thanks @jepson-liu.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: surface human topic names in agent context, prompt metadata, and plugin hook metadata by learning names from Telegram forum service messages. (#65973) Thanks @ptahdunbar.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/Ollama: forward the configured embedded-run timeout into the global undici stream timeout tuning so slow local Ollama runs no longer inherit the default stream cutoff instead of the operator-set run timeout. (#63175) Thanks @mindcraftreader and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型/Codex: include `apiKey` 在 the Codex provider catalog output so the Pi ModelRegistry validator no longer rejects the entry 和 静默地 drops all custom 模型 从 every provider 在 `模型.json`. (#66180) Thanks @hoyyeva.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Codex: include `apiKey` in the codex provider catalog output so the Pi ModelRegistry validator no longer rejects the entry and silently drops all custom models from every provider in `models.json`. (#66180) Thanks @hoyyeva.

changes.title: Slack/interactions: apply the configured global `allowFrom` owner allowlist to channel block-action 和 modal interactive events, require an expected sender id 为了 cross-verification, 和 reject ambiguous channel types so interactive triggers can no longer bypass the documented allowlist intent 在 channels 不适用 a `users` list. Open-通过-default behavior is preserved 当 no allowlists are configured. (#66028) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/interactions: apply the configured global `allowFrom` owner allowlist to channel block-action and modal interactive events, require an expected sender id for cross-verification, and reject ambiguous channel types so interactive triggers can no longer bypass the documented allowlist intent in channels without a `users` list. Open-by-default behavior is preserved when no allowlists are configured. (#66028) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Media-understanding/attachments: fail closed 当 a local attachment 路径 cannot be canonically resolved via `realpath`, so a `realpath` 错误 can no longer downgrade the canonical-roots allowlist check to a non-canonical comparison; attachments that also have a URL still fall back to the network fetch 路径. (#66022) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Media-understanding/attachments: fail closed when a local attachment path cannot be canonically resolved via `realpath`, so a `realpath` error can no longer downgrade the canonical-roots allowlist check to a non-canonical comparison; attachments that also have a URL still fall back to the network fetch path. (#66022) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/网关-工具: reject `配置.patch` 和 `配置.apply` calls 从 the 模型-facing 网关 工具 当 they would newly 启用 any flag enumerated 通过 `openclaw 安全 audit` (为了 example `dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth`, `allowInsecureAuth`, `dangerouslyAllowHostHeaderOriginFallback`, `hooks.gmail.allowUnsafeExternalContent`, `tools.exec.applyPatch.workspaceOnly: false`); already-enabled flags pass through unchanged so non-dangerous edits 在 the same patch still apply, 和 direct authenticated operator RPC behavior is unchanged. (#62006) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/gateway-tool: reject `config.patch` and `config.apply` calls from the model-facing gateway tool when they would newly enable any flag enumerated by `openclaw security audit` (for example `dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth`, `allowInsecureAuth`, `dangerouslyAllowHostHeaderOriginFallback`, `hooks.gmail.allowUnsafeExternalContent`, `tools.exec.applyPatch.workspaceOnly: false`); already-enabled flags pass through unchanged so non-dangerous edits in the same patch still apply, and direct authenticated operator RPC behavior is unchanged. (#62006) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Google image generation: strip a trailing `/OpenAI` suffix 从 configured Google base URLs only 当 calling the native Gemini image API so Gemini image requests 停止 404ing 不适用 破坏性变更 explicit OpenAI-compatible Google endpoints. (#66445) Thanks @dapzthelegend.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: persist learned topic names to the Telegram session sidecar store so agent context can keep using human topic names after a restart instead of relearning from future service metadata. (#66107) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.rawTitle: Doctor/systemd: keep `openclaw doctor --repair` and service reinstall from re-embedding dotenv-backed secrets in user systemd units, while preserving newer inline overrides over stale state-dir `.env` values. (#66249) Thanks @tmimmanuel.
